title: BSNC’s Eldest Shareholder: Elizabeth “Betty” Anagick
summary: BSNC shareholder Elizabeth “Betty” Anagick is an inspirational Elder. Born in Koyuk, Betty is the eldest great-grandchild of Chief Nashalook, the last traditional Chief and Shaman of Unalakleet. She is 96 years old and resides in Unalakleet.
